title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
instructor_job: Lead Full Stack Instructor & Software Architect
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Build real-world projects using modern tools and frameworks. Understand both frontend and backend development in depth.

title: Advanced JavaScript Mastery
description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript concepts and patterns. Explore closures, async programming, and advanced ES6+ features. Improve your problem-solving and coding efficiency.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn the basics of user interface and user experience design. Understand design principles, color theory, and typography. Create user-friendly and visually appealing layouts.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Master DSA concepts for coding interviews and problem-solving. Learn efficient algorithms and optimize your code performance. Practice real-world problems and interview questions.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Analyze data and build models using Python libraries. Work with NumPy, Pandas, and visualization tools. Gain hands-on experience with real datasets and projects.

title: Mobile App Development with Flutter
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart. Learn UI design, state management, and API integration. Create fast and beautiful apps for both Android and iOS.
